India vs England FIH Women’s Hockey Qualifiers Final in Hyderabad

Mar 14, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

India vs England FIH Women’s Hockey Qualifiers Final in Hyderabad

The India women’s national field hockey team is set to face England in the final of the FIH Women’s World Cup 2026 Qualifiers in Hyderabad, aiming to secure their World Cup spot after strong performances throughout the tournament.
